prompt: Run the cleanup for all active demos and then destroy just the scenario infrastructure (leave the base environment in place). Use auto-approve so it doesn't prompt me.

assertions.name: finds_active_demos_first
assertions.description: Uses plabs scenarios list --demo-active (or plabs demo --list) to discover which demos are active before cleaning up

assertions.name: uses_cleanup_command
assertions.description: Uses plabs cleanup <id> to remove demo artifacts (not just destroy)

assertions.name: no_all_flag_on_destroy
assertions.description: Does NOT use plabs destroy --all (which would remove base infrastructure)

assertions.name: uses_auto_approve
assertions.description: Uses -y or --auto-approve on plabs destroy as requested
